name: Vanilla Dream
description: Classic creamy vanilla ice cream made with fresh ingredients.

name: Chocolate Existential Crisis
description: Rich chocolate flavor that makes you question your life choices with every bite.

name: Strawberry Regret
description: Sweet at first, followed by a subtle aftertaste of poor decisions.

name: Mint Condition (Literally Coins)
description: Refreshing mint with a metallic finish. Contains absolutely no legal tender. Probably.

name: Cookies & Screams
description: Classic cookies and cream, but the cookies whisper your name at night.

name: Caramelized Keyboard
description: Notes of sugar, butter, and faint hints of overworked WASD keys.

name: Motor Oil
description: A flavor my friend Fadi likes. Extreme demand warrants inclusion. Price set to offset expense.

name: Mango but It's Suspicious
description: Tropical mango flavor that tastes slightly too confident about itself.

name: Pistachio Ceiling Dust
description: Nutty and earthy with undertones of 'should this be here?'

name: Blue Screen of Cream
description: A smooth blueberry flavor that crashes unexpectedly and restarts your appetite.
